reference.title: Session Status Values
reference.shortdesc: Reference for the five session status values, their meaning, and their effect on scoring and budget calculations.

row.entry: Captured but not committed to a week. The session exists as an intention.
Committed to a scheduled date. Reflects an intention to work on the project this week.
Yes (as a planned session in the denominator)
Yes (as a planned session in the denominator)
Work is complete. Portfolio Manager records the completion timestamp.
Yes (as a completed session in the numerator and denominator)
Session was abandoned. Can be deleted.

section.title: Valid Status Transitions
section.p: Sessions can move between states as follows:

ul.li: Done → (terminal; edit the session to change if needed)
Cancelled → (terminal; delete or edit to reactivate)
